howItWorks.title: How It Works
howItWorks.subtitle: Everything you need to know about booking with Da-El World Travelers
howItWorks.paymentIntro: When you make a reservation, you pay a $7 USD fee to secure your booking. The remainder is paid directly at the accommodation.
howItWorks.adminTeamAvailable: Our admin team is available to assist you:
howItWorks.touristStep1Desc: Browse our catalog of verified accommodations in Cuba. Use filters to find the perfect place by location, price, number of guests, and amenities. You can search without logging in.
howItWorks.touristStep2Desc: When you find the perfect property, select your dates and number of guests. You'll pay a $7 USD booking fee to secure your reservation. This fee is non-refundable. The remainder of your payment will be made directly at the accommodation.
howItWorks.touristStep3Desc: After you book, our admin team reviews your reservation. This typically takes less than 24 hours. You'll receive an email notification once your booking is approved or if there are any issues.
howItWorks.touristStep4Desc: Once approved, you'll receive check-in details. Pay the remainder of your stay directly at the accommodation. After your stay, leave a review to help other travelers!
howItWorks.hostStep1Desc: Create an account and select "List my property" as your role. Our team will review your application and approve your host account.
howItWorks.hostStep2Desc: Add photos, description, amenities, pricing, and availability for your property. Set your blocked dates for when the property is not available.
howItWorks.hostStep3Desc: Our admin team reviews your property listing to ensure it meets our quality standards. Once approved, your property becomes visible to tourists.
howItWorks.hostStep4Desc: When tourists book your property, you'll be notified. After admin approval, you'll receive the guest's contact information to coordinate check-in details. Payment is collected directly from the guest at the accommodation.
howItWorks.bookingFeeDesc: A $7 USD fee is charged when you make a reservation. This fee:
howItWorks.bookingFeeCrypto: Is paid via cryptocurrency (USDT, BTC, ETH)
howItWorks.remainderDesc: The remaining balance is paid directly at the accommodation, in cash. You have two options:
howItWorks.remainderFull: Full payment on arrival: Pay the entire remaining amount when you check in
howItWorks.remainderDaily: Daily payment: Pay day by day during your stay (flexible option)
howItWorks.cancellationDesc: The $7 USD booking fee is non-refundable if you cancel or if your booking is rejected for not meeting requirements. Exception: if the rejection is due to our own error, you'll receive a refund in cryptocurrency (USDT, BEP20 network).
howItWorks.cancellationRejected: If your booking is rejected by the admin, you will be notified by email. If the rejection was due to our own error, we will arrange a refund in USDT (BEP20); otherwise, the fee covers the service of processing and reviewing your reservation.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.s1Content: By accessing or using Da-El World Travelers ("the Platform"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with any part of these terms, you may not use the Platform.
terms.s2Content: To use this Platform, you must:
terms.s2Age: Be at least 16 years of age
terms.s2Parental: If under 18, have consent from a parent or legal guardian
terms.s2Legal: Have the legal capacity to enter into binding agreements
terms.s2Accurate: Provide accurate and complete registration information
terms.s3Content: Da-El World Travelers is a platform that connects tourists seeking accommodations with hosts offering properties in Cuba. We facilitate the booking process and collect a service fee.
terms.s4Confidentiality: Maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials
terms.s4Activities: All activities that occur under your account
terms.s4Notify: Notifying us immediately of any unauthorized use
terms.s4Reserve: We reserve the right to suspend or terminate accounts that violate these terms.
terms.s5Offer: You are making an offer to rent the property for the selected dates
terms.s5Fee: A $7 USD non-refundable fee is charged to secure your reservation
terms.s5Approval: The booking is subject to admin approval within 24 hours
terms.s5Approved: When your booking is approved, you will receive a confirmation email.
terms.s5Rejected: If rejected, you will be notified by email (fee is not refunded, unless the rejection was due to our own error, in which case it is refunded in USDT BEP20)
terms.s6Intro: When you make a booking, a $7 USD fee is charged to secure your reservation. The remainder is paid directly to the host.
terms.s6Flat: A flat fee of $7 USD is charged per booking
terms.s6NonRefundable: This fee is non-refundable, unless rejected due to our own error (see section 7)
terms.s6Processed: Payment is processed via cryptocurrency through NOWPayments
terms.s6RemainderDesc: The remaining balance is paid directly to the host at the accommodation, in cash
terms.s6RemainderMethods: Payment methods and timing are arranged between you and the host
terms.s7Fee: The $7 USD booking fee is non-refundable, unless the booking is rejected due to our own error, in which case it is refunded in cryptocurrency (USDT, BEP20 network)
terms.s7Cancel: You may cancel your booking before admin approval
terms.s7AfterApproval: Once approved, cancellation terms are between you and the host
terms.s7Rejected: If the admin rejects your booking due to our own error, the fee is refunded in USDT (BEP20); in any other case, the fee is not refunded
terms.s8Accurate: Provide accurate information about their property
terms.s8Maintain: Maintain the property in a safe and clean condition
terms.s8Comply: Comply with all applicable local laws and regulations
terms.s8Respond: Respond to booking requests in a timely manner
terms.s9Illegal: Use the Platform for any illegal purpose
terms.s9False: Post false, misleading, or fraudulent content
terms.s9Harass: Harass, abuse, or harm other users
terms.s9Access: Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the Platform
terms.s9Automated: Use automated systems to access the Platform
terms.s10Content: Da-El World Travelers acts as an intermediary platform. We are not responsible for:
terms.s10Quality: The quality, safety, or legality of listed properties
terms.s10Accuracy: The accuracy of listing information provided by hosts
terms.s10Conduct: The conduct of users on or off the Platform
terms.s10Damages: Any damages arising from use of the Platform or accommodations
terms.s10Total: Our total liability shall not exceed the amount of the booking fee paid.
terms.s11Content: All content on this Platform, including text, graphics, logos, and software, is the property of Da-El World Travelers and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reproduce, distribute, or create derivative works without our express written permission.
terms.s12Content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes will be effective immediately upon posting. Your continued use of the Platform constitutes acceptance of the modified terms.
terms.s13Content: For questions about these Terms of Service, contact us at:

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.s1Content: Da-El World Travelers ("we," "our," or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you use our platform.
privacy.s2Name: Name and email address (required for registration)
privacy.s3Send: Send booking confirmations and updates via email
privacy.s3Communicate: Communicate with you about your reservations
privacy.s4Auth: Authentication tokens: Stored in your browser's local storage to keep you logged in
privacy.s4Lang: Language preference: To remember your selected language
privacy.s4NoTracking: We do not use tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or third-party advertising cookies.
privacy.s5Content: We share your information only with:
privacy.s5Hosts: Hosts: After booking approval, we share your name and contact information with the host to coordinate your stay
privacy.s5Payment: Payment Processor: NOWPayments processes cryptocurrency transactions. We do not have access to your wallet keys
privacy.s5Email: Email Service: SendGrid delivers transactional emails (booking confirmations, notifications)
privacy.s5Database: Database: MongoDB Atlas stores your data securely in the cloud
privacy.s5NoSell: We do not sell, rent, or trade your personal information to third parties for marketing purposes.
privacy.s6Bcrypt: Passwords are hashed using bcrypt (one-way encryption)
privacy.s6Https: HTTPS encryption for all data transmission
privacy.s6RateLimit: Rate limiting to prevent brute-force attacks
privacy.s7Content: We retain your personal information for as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, we will remove your personal data within 30 days, except where required by law.
privacy.s8Access: Access: Request a copy of the personal data we hold about you
privacy.s8Rectification: Rectification: Request correction of inaccurate data
privacy.s8Deletion: Deletion: Request deletion of your personal data
privacy.s8Portability: Portability: Request your data in a portable format
privacy.s8Objection: Objection: Object to processing of your personal data
privacy.s8Contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at supportdaelworld@gmail.com
privacy.s9Content: Our platform is not intended for children under 16. Users between 16 and 18 must have parental consent to use the platform. We do not knowingly collect information from children under 16.
privacy.s10Content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Changes will be posted on this page with an updated revision date. Continued use of the platform after changes constitutes acceptance of the new policy.
privacy.s11Content: For privacy-related inquiries, contact us at:

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Find answers to the most common questions about Da-El World Travelers
faq.q1Question: How does the booking process work?
faq.q1Step1: Search: Browse properties without logging in. Use filters for location, price, guests, and amenities.
faq.q1Step2: Book: Select your dates and pay a $7 USD booking fee via cryptocurrency to secure your reservation.
faq.q1Step3: Approval: Our admin team reviews your booking within 24 hours. You'll receive an email notification.
faq.q1Step4: Stay: Once approved, you receive the host's contact info and check-in details. Pay the remainder directly at the accommodation.
faq.q2Question: What happens if my booking is rejected?
faq.q2Answer: If the admin rejects your booking, you will receive an email notification with the reason (if provided). If the rejection is due to our own error, we will arrange a refund of the $7 USD fee in cryptocurrency (USDT, BEP20 network). In any other case, the $7 USD booking fee is non-refundable.
faq.q2Contact: You can contact our admin team if you have questions about the rejection.
faq.q3Question: Can I cancel my booking? Do I get a refund?
faq.q3Answer: You can cancel your booking before it is approved by the admin. However, the $7 USD booking fee is non-refundable under any circumstances.
faq.q3Approved: Once your booking is approved, cancellation terms are between you and the host. We recommend communicating directly with the host to discuss any changes.
faq.q4Question: How do I pay for my booking?
faq.q4Answer: When you book, you pay a $7 USD fee via cryptocurrency to secure your reservation. The remainder is paid directly to the host on arrival. The fee is processed via cryptocurrency through NOWPayments. We accept:
faq.q4Refund: If you need a refund, it will be issued only in USDT (BEP20 network), due to restrictions on card usage.
faq.q4Process: During checkout, you'll be redirected to NOWPayments to complete the payment. The process typically takes a few minutes for blockchain confirmation.
faq.q5Question: How do I become a host?
faq.q5Answer: To become a host on Da-El World Travelers:
faq.q5Step1: Register: Create an account and select "List my property" as your role.
faq.q5Step2: Approval: Our admin team will review your application and approve your host account.
faq.q5Step3: Publish: Once approved, you can publish your property with photos, description, amenities, pricing, and availability.
faq.q5Step4: Go Live: After admin approval of your listing, your property becomes visible to tourists.
faq.q5NoFee: There is no fee to list your property. The $7 USD fee is paid by the tourist when they book.
faq.q6Question: Is it safe to use Da-El World Travelers?
faq.q6Verified: Verified listings: All properties are reviewed by our admin team before going live
faq.q6Secure: Secure payments: Cryptocurrency transactions are processed through NOWPayments with industry-standard encryption
faq.q6Data: Data protection: Passwords are encrypted (bcrypt), data is transmitted via HTTPS, and we use rate limiting to prevent attacks
faq.q6Isolation: Multi-tenant isolation: Each tenant's data is completely separated
faq.q6Reviews: Reviews: Our blind review system ensures honest feedback from both parties
faq.q6Practice: However, we recommend exercising standard internet safety practices and communicating through the platform.
faq.q7Answer: Our admin team is available to help you:
faq.q7Feedback: You can also use the Feedback form on the platform to send us your comments or suggestions.
faq.q8Question: What happens with my personal data?
faq.q8Collect: What we collect: Name, email, phone (optional), and booking information
faq.q8Use: How we use it: To process bookings, send notifications, and provide customer support
faq.q8Share: Who we share it with: Only the host (after booking approval) and our payment processor (NOWPayments)
faq.q8Security: Security: Passwords are encrypted, data is transmitted via HTTPS
faq.q8Rights: Your rights: You can request access, correction, or deletion of your data
faq.q8PrivacyLink: Read our full Privacy Policy for complete details.
faq.contactSupport: Contact our support team or send us your feedback:
